name: cli-printing-press
description: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions, websites, HAR captures, or OpenAPI specs through a Codex-native Printing Press skill.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and polish agent-native Go CLIs
interface.longDescription: Use the Printing Press from Codex to research an API, generate a production Go CLI and MCP server, run verification gates, polish output, score generated CLIs, and publish library-ready artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use $printing-press to generate, polish, score, or publish an agent-native CLI.
